findings.description: Page header shows section context 「04-02 ビジネスシステム」but no section entity for this heading exists in the release. This is expected if the section entity is anchored to the prior page; noted as low-severity for completeness.

reviewer_notes: Both figure entities accurately match the two robot diagrams on the page. Figure p147::0 caption correctly captures the supervised learning diagram (input 5 + correct answer 5 → outputs 5, annotation 教師あり学習では正解を与える). Figure p147::2 correctly captures the unsupervised learning diagram (input 5 only → outputs ?, annotation 教師なし学習では正解を与えない). The 教師なし学習 term definition is complete and accurate. One low-severity missing_visual for the section header 04-02 ビジネスシステム which is a continuation page artifact.
